title: Tangy Flaky Light Kurdish Ackee Crumble
description: A tangy and flaky light Middle Eastern dish featuring ackee as the main ingredient, this recipe is nut-free-friendly and suitable for a breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Ackee
ingredients.amount: 1 cup fresh or frozen (thawed if frozen)

instructions: In a medium saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until softened.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for another minute. Mix in yogurt, jalapeno peppers, and sour cream; let it simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and fold in the thawed ackee gently to avoid breaking them apart too much.
Transfer mixture to a greased baking dish. Spread evenly.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
